testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.domain.video.upload.VideoUploadServiceTest

testcase.name: rejects empty multipart with EmptyVideoUploadException before touching storage()
respects custom allowed MIME types from properties()
stamps the JWT-asserted advertiserId onto the persisted Video row()
accepts upload exactly at the size limit (boundary)()
all upload exceptions extend the sealed VideoUploadException base()
rejects upload that exceeds the configured size limit()
rejects upload whose Content-Type is missing entirely()
rejects upload with a blank advertiserId before touching storage()
MIME failure short-circuits before size check()
accepts a valid mp4 upload, delegates to storage, persists Video row()
rejects upload whose Content-Type is not video mp4()
rejects upload with no original filename()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:32.967+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.d.video.upload.VideoUploadService : video uploaded id=84d59f34-415e-45af-b052-0f8f7d0a33aa filename=061eca2a-4aec-4be9-bf56-7056441fe636.mp4 advertiserId=00000000-0000-4000-8000-0000000000aa size=1B mime=video/quicktime 2026-05-02T23:50:32.969+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.d.video.upload.VideoUploadService : video uploaded id=9ab0fad0-a322-4aa2-8375-c1cf52ae52d9 filename=e4f799c7-84d4-4340-81b4-c770543eb560.mp4 advertiserId=00000000-0000-4000-8000-0000000000aa size=1B mime=video/mp4 2026-05-02T23:50:32.970+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.d.video.upload.VideoUploadService : video uploaded id=de50838b-e427-4f90-a6ff-dde7aae8d9e6 filename=06ab2f97-0a6e-4ed8-b57c-234b434118d9.mp4 advertiserId=00000000-0000-4000-8000-0000000000aa size=1000B mime=video/mp4 2026-05-02T23:50:32.974+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.d.video.upload.VideoUploadService : video uploaded id=16469f63-df6b-4b47-80b0-ccd65b579135 filename=ab910dfe-0ca6-4f47-bee5-189db2f1bb19.mp4 advertiserId=00000000-0000-4000-8000-0000000000aa size=1B mime=Video/MP4 2026-05-02T23:50:32.977+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.d.video.upload.VideoUploadService : video uploaded id=110b6b0c-033c-4f44-a84a-d802463ec33c filename=06a6e31b-2e0d-40a6-a10d-3717bcdb2168.mp4 advertiserId=00000000-0000-4000-8000-0000000000aa size=14B mime=video/mp4
